briefdescription.para: This function checks if a particular PLM Command ID is supported or not.

detaileddescription.para: Command ID is the only payload parameter.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides no operation.

detaileddescription.para: The command is supported for alignment purposes. Zero command payload parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the device ID and fills in the response buffer.

para.verbatim: Command: GetDeviceID Reserved[31:24]=0 Length[23:16]=[0] PLM=1 CMD_DEVID=18 Payload = 0 The command reads PMC_TAP_IDCODE register and EFUSE_CACHE_IP_DISABLE_0 register and fills the command response array with these values.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides generic implementation for both 32-bit and 64-bit mask poll command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - Address - Mask - Expected Value - Timeout in us - Deferred Error flag - Optional 0 - Return error in case of failure, 1 - Ignore error, return success always 2 - Defer error till the end of partition load 3 - Break to end offset in case of failure - Error Code

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure
is address of mask poll
is flag indicating if the address is 64-bit

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XST_FAILURE if timedout.

briefdescription.para: This function provides 32 bit mask poll command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - Address - Mask - Expected Value - Timeout in us - Deferred Error flag - Optional 0 - Return error in case of failure, 1 - Ignore error, return success always 2 - Defer error till the end of partition load 3 - Break to end offset in case of failure - Error Code

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XST_FAILURE if timedout.

briefdescription.para: This function provides 32 bit mask write command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - Address - Mask - Value

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides 32 bit Write command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - Address - Value

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides delay command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameter delay in micro seconds

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

memberdef.argsstring: (u64 Dest, u64 Src, u32 Len, u32 Flags)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_DmaTransfer

briefdescription.para: This function provides functionality for DMA write.

parameterdescription.para: is the destination address
is the source address
is the number of words to be transferred
is the DMA transfer related flags

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_UNALIGNED_DMA_XFER if unaligned DMA transfer fails.

briefdescription.para: This function provides DMA write command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - High Dest Addr - Low Dest Addr

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function provides 64 bit mask poll command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - High Address - Low Address - Mask - Expected Value - Timeout in us - Deferred Error flag - Optional 0 - Return error in case of failure, 1 - Ignore error, return success always 2 - Defer error till the end of partition load 3 - Break to end offset in case of failure - Error Code

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XST_FAILURE if timedout.

briefdescription.para: This function provides 64 bit mask write command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - High Address - Low Address - Mask - Value

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides 64 bit write command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - High Address - Low Address - Value

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides DMA Xfer command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - High Src Addr - Low Src Addr - High Dest Addr - Low Dest Addr - Params - AXI burst type (Fixed/INCR)

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function provides INIT_SEQ command execution.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure and unused

listitem.para: XPLMI_ERR_CMD_NOT_SUPPORTED always.

briefdescription.para: This function processes and provides readback length.

parameterdescription.para: is the current readback length

briefdescription.para: This function provides CFI READ command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - Params - SMPA/JTAG/DDR - High Dest Addr - Low Dest Addr - Read Length in number of words to be read from CFU - DATA (CFU READ Packets)

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_READBACK_BUFFER_OVERFLOW if readback buffer overflows.

inbodydescription.para: Read the destination interface and destination address
If the destination interface is not DDR, write to the SLAVE BOOT REGISTER to set the SBI mode correctly.

briefdescription.para: This function provides SET command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - High Dest Addr - Low Dest Addr - Length (Length of words to set to value) - Value

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides DMA key hole write command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - High Dest Addr - Low Dest Addr - Keyhole Size in bytes - DATA

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function provides SET BOARD command execution.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - Board Name

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides GET BOARD command execution.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
High Addr
Low Addr
Max size in words

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

inbodydescription.para: Verify the destination address range before writing

briefdescription.para: This function sets the WDT parameters used in PLM.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
Node Id for PMC, PS MIO
Periodicity

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function adds Debug string to PLM logs.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
Debug String

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the value at an address and displays and adds the value to PLM logs.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
Low Address
High Address (Optional)

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides Marker command execution.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
Type
String

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides functionality to move procs when proc command is received for existing BufferId.

parameterdescription.para: is the index of BufferId to be moved
is the list of buffers whose buffers need to be moved

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure
If only one proc is available and if a new proc command is received with same ID, it can directly be overwritten.
If proc command is received for existing BufferId, move all procs behind this to front
Call XPlmi_DmaTransfer with flags DMA0 and INCR
Update BufferList with moved data

briefdescription.para: This function sets PSM BufferList address to given Address and Size.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of Buffer reserved memory for PSM BufferList
is the size of Buffer reserved memory for PSM BufferList in bytes

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure
XPLMI_ERR_PROC_INVALID_ADDRESS_RANGE if provided proc address is invalid.
Validate the allocated memory address range. Otherwise return an error.
Initialize first Data address of PSM BufferList to the given Address and BufferMemSize with the given Size

briefdescription.para: This function searches Buffer list with the buffer Id to provide buffer address and buffer length.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the list of buffers to search
is the id of the buffer to search for
is the address of the Buffer found
is the length of the Buffer found

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_BUFFER_MEM_NOT_AVAILABLE if Buffer memory is not available for storing.
XPLMI_ERR_PROCID_NOT_VALID if provided proc id is invalid.
Check if Buffer Memory is available.
Search for the buffer index which has a matching BufferId.
Execute proc if the received BufferId is valid.
Fill BufAddr and BufLen pointers with resulting values.

briefdescription.para: This function provides functionality to execute given ProcId when request to execute a particular ProcId.

parameterdescription.para: is ProcId to be executed

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_PROC_LPD_NOT_INITIALIZED The Proc command cannot be executed because the LPD is not initialized.
If the ProcId has MSB set, then its in PMC RAM memory.
If LPD is not initialized or Proc memory is not available, do not execute the proc and return an error.
Fill ProcCdo structure with Proc related parameters.
Execute Proc.

briefdescription.para: This function copies the proc data to reserved PSM/PMC RAM when proc command is received.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
ProcId
Data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_PROC_LPD_NOT_INITIALIZED The Proc command cannot be stored because the LPD is not initialized.

inbodydescription.para: Store Proc in the respective Buffer List

briefdescription.para: This function stores the buffer data into the buffer list provided.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure
is the Id of the Buffer to be stored in the buffer list
is the pointer to the BufferList

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_BUFFER_MEM_NOT_AVAILABLE if Buffer memory is not available for storing.
XPLMI_UNSUPPORTED_PROC_LENGTH if received proc does not fit in proc memory.
XPLMI_MAX_PROC_COMMANDS_RECEIVED on maximum supported proc commands received.

briefdescription.para: This function provides Over Temperature Check command execution.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
Delay in milliseconds

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.

briefdescription.para: This function provides start of the block.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - Offset : specifies no. of words until "end" of the block - String : optional for debugging purpose

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function provides end of the block.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function skips all the commands until the Levels number of nested "end".

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function sets ipi access permissions for the range of commands requested.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
Api Id Upper Limit, Api Id Lower Limit, Module Id
Access Permission Mask

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_SET_IPI_INVALID_API_ID_UPPER if the Api Id Upper limit is greater than maximum api count
XPLMI_ERR_SET_IPI_INVALID_API_ID_LOWER if the Api Id Lower limit is greater than Api Id upper limit
XPLMI_ERR_SET_IPI_ACCESS_PERM_NOT_SET if the Ipi Access permission is not set properly
XPLMI_ERR_SET_IPI_PERM_BUFF_NOT_REGISTERED if the permission buffer in which the access permissions has to be stored is not registered
Set permissions only if Access Permission buffer is registered
Validate the API ID limits.
Set access permissions for api id range specified in the command

briefdescription.para: This function triggers secure lockdown when Tamper Trigger IPI is received.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
Tamper Response

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_INVALID_TAMPER_RESPONSE on invalid tamper response received for TamperTrigger IPI call.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the access status of DDR MC main registers.

parameterdescription.para: - DDR MC number
- To be set status(Busy/Free)

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function handles XPlmi_SetDDRMCRegSts command.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
DDR MC number
To be set status(Busy/Free)

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function calls the handler for invalid commands.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to payload data
buffer to store response of slaves

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful communication error code On failure
